topic: Determination of Forward and Futures Prices
title: Valuing Forward Contracts: The value of a futures...
summary: Analyze the mechanics and characteristics of futures contracts.
prompt: The value of a futures contract is determined by:

options.text: A forward contract to lock in the exchange rate
The value of a futures contract is influenced by the current spot price,

solution: The value of a futures contract is influenced by the current spot price, expected future prices, interest rates, and cost of carry. [[29]]
